prompt: A black widow spider standing still in a neutral idle pose. Subtle, looping body sway — the abdomen gently bobs up and down by a few millimeters. The front pair of legs occasionally lift and reposition slightly, as if feeling the ground. All eight legs planted with a wide, stable stance. The cephalothorax tilts forward very slightly in a predatory ready posture. Slow, breathing-like rhythm. Loop duration approximately 2-3 seconds.
